message.content:
@startuml
package "rugged" as rugged {
    interface Tile {
        method interpolateElevation(φ, λ)
        method pixelIntersection(NormalizedGeodeticPoint, los, φ index, λ index)
    }

    interface IntersectionAlgorithm {
        method intersection(ellipsoid, position, los)
        method refineIntersection(ellipsoid, position, los, closeGuess)
    }

    interface Rugged {
        method directLocation(sensorName, line)
    }

    interface LineSensor {
    }
}

package "mission" as mission {
    actor UserMain
}

package "api" as api {
    actor Rugged
}

package "utils" as utils {
    interface ExtendedEllipsoid {
        method pointAtLatitude(position, los, φ, closereference)
        method pointAtLongitude(position, los, λ)
        method pointAtAltitude(position, los, h)
        method pointOnGround(position, los)
    }

    interface SpacecraftToObservedBody {
    }
}

package "linesensor" as linesensor {
    actor LineSensor
}

package "raster" as raster {
    interface Tile
}

package "intersection" as intersection {
    interface IntersectionAlgorithm
}

rugged --> raster : evaluate DEM
rugged --> intersection : compute grid points crossings
rugged --> api : delegate DEM intersection
api --> linesensor : getLOS(date, pixel)
api --> linesensor : getDate(line)
api --> utils : convert geodetic points
api --> utils : convert positions/directions
utils --> intersection : refineIntersection
utils --> extendedEllipsoid : pointAtLatitude
utils --> extendedEllipsoid : pointAtLongitude
utils --> extendedEllipsoid : pointAtAltitude
utils --> extendedEllipsoid : pointOnGround
utils --> spacecraftToObservedBody : SpacecraftToObservedBody
linesensor --> extendedEllipsoid : convert geodetic points
linesensor --> extendedEllipsoid : convert positions/directions
linesensor --> extendedEllipsoid : pointOnGround
linesensor --> extendedEllipsoid : pointAtAltitude
linesensor --> extendedEllipsoid : pointAtLatitude
linesensor --> extendedEllipsoid : pointAtLongitude
linesensor --> extendedEllipsoid : pointOnGround
linesensor --> extendedEllipsoid : convert geodetic points
